# श्रद्धांजलि बॅनर

> Free online memorial banner generator for Marathi and Hindi-speaking families in Maharashtra, India.

## What this site does

Creates customizable funeral/memorial announcement banners that families can download and print or share digitally. The user fills in details — deceased name, age, date of passing, ceremony location, family members — and a formatted banner image is generated entirely in the browser and downloaded as a JPG.

## Key features

- 6 visual banner themes (परंपरागत / Traditional, सूर्यास्त / Sunset, सागर / Ocean, क्लासिक / Classic, सोने / Golden, आकाश / Lavender)
- 3-language UI: Marathi (default), Hindi, English
- Photo upload with decorative frame overlay (bg_photoframe.png)
- Multiple download formats:
  - Standard print banner (landscape)
  - WhatsApp status (9:16 portrait, 1080×1920)
  - Instagram story (9:16 portrait, 1080×1920)
  - Instagram post (1:1 square, 1080×1080)
  - Flex print (2×3, 3×4, 4×6, 6×4 ft at 72/150/300 DPI)
- Completely free, no account, no data stored on server

## Audience

Marathi and Hindi speaking families in Maharashtra, India and the Indian diaspora who need to create memorial announcement banners (श्रद्धांजलि बॅनर) for religious ceremonies — दशक्रिया, अंत्यसंस्कार, shradhanjali programmes.

## Common search terms this serves

श्रद्धांजलि बॅनर, शोक संदेश बॅनर, अंत्यसंस्कार बॅनर, nidhan banner generator, dasagriya banner, diwangat banner, free marathi memorial banner, shraddhanjali banner online

## Technical

- Static single-page application, hosted on Netlify
- Client-side only image generation using html2canvas library
- No backend, no cookies, no analytics beyond Google Tag (G-67SQSS4D5L)
- Bootstrap 5 grid used only inside the banner element for layout capture
- Fonts: Rozha One (display), Tiro Devanagari Marathi (body) via Google Fonts

## URLs

- Main app: https://shradhanjalibanner.in/
- Sitemap: https://shradhanjalibanner.in/sitemap.xml
